title: Four-on-the-floor house
summary: Classic house beat with 909 drums, acid bass line, and atmospheric pad.
code:
setcpm(124/4)

$: s("bd*4").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ ~ ~ oh").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.3)
$: s("~ cp ~ ~").bank("RolandTR909")
$: s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.4)

$: note("c2 ~ c2 [~ c3]").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(sine.range(300, 1200).slow(8))
  .lpq(12)
  .decay(0.12).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.7)

$: note("<c4 eb4 g4 bb4>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .room(0.6).gain(0.25)

title: Ambient pad wash
summary: Slow-moving chord pads with reverb, delay, and gentle filter modulation.
code:
setcpm(72/4)

$: chord("<Cm9 Fm9 Bbmaj7 Ebmaj7>")
  .s("gm_pad_warm")
  .voicing()
  .room(0.8).size(0.95)
  .lpf(sine.range(800, 2000).slow(16))
  .delay(0.4).delaytime(0.5).delayfeedback(0.5)
  .gain(0.35)

$: note("~ ~ c5 ~").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .room(0.9).delay(0.6).gain(0.15)

title: Chopped breakbeat
summary: Euclidean rhythms meet chopped breaks with filter automation.
code:
setcpm(140/4)

$: s("bd(3,8)").gain(0.9)
$: s("sd(2,8,1)").gain(0.8)
$: s("hh(5,8)").gain(0.4)
$: s("oh(1,8,3)").gain(0.3)

$: note("c2 [~ c2] eb2 ~").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(800)
  .decay(0.1).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.7)

$: note("c4 eb4 g4 bb4").s("triangle")
  .every(3, rev)
  .jux(x => x.fast(2))
  .room(0.3).gain(0.3)

title: Lo-fi hip hop
summary: Chill dusty beat with jazzy chords, vinyl crackle texture, and swung hi-hats.
code:
setcpm(85/4)

$: s("bd ~ [~ bd] ~, ~ sd ~ sd")
  .bank("RolandTR808")
  .gain(0.8)

$: s("hh*8").gain(0.3)
  .speed("1 1.02 0.98 1.01 1 0.99 1.02 1")

$: progression('Dm9 G13 Cmaj9 Am7', { rhythm: 'comp' })
  .lpf(1800)
  .room(0.4)
  .gain(0.45)

$: note("<d3 g2 c3 a2>").s("gm_acoustic_bass")
  .gain(0.55)

title: Polyrhythmic exploration
summary: Layered Euclidean patterns creating interlocking polyrhythmic grooves.
code:
setcpm(110/4)

// 3 against 4 against 5:
$: s("bd(3,8)").gain(0.9)
$: s("rim(5,8)").gain(0.5)
$: s("hh(7,16)").gain(0.35)
$: s("cp(2,8,3)").room(0.5).gain(0.4)

$: note("c3(3,8)").s("gm_acoustic_bass")
  .gain(0.6)

$: note("g4(5,8)").s("gm_vibraphone")
  .room(0.5).delay(0.3)
  .gain(0.3)

title: Minimal techno
summary: Stripped-back techno with evolving filter sweeps and sparse percussion.
code:
setcpm(132/4)

$: s("bd*4").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ hh ~ hh").gain(0.3)
$: s("~ ~ ~ rim").every(4, x => x.fast(2)).gain(0.5)

$: note("c2*4").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(sine.range(200, 3000).slow(16))
  .lpq(15)
  .decay(0.08).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.6)

$: note("<c4 ~ eb4 ~>").s("triangle")
  .room(0.4).delay(0.5).delaytime(0.375)
  .gain(0.2)

title: Jazz standard sketch
summary: II-V-I progression with jazz-comp style, walking bass, and brushed drums.
code:
setcpm(140/4)

$: progression('Dm7 G7 Cmaj7 Cmaj7', {
  style: 'jazz-comp',
  bass: true,
}).gain(0.5)

$: s("bd ~ [~ bd] ~, ~ sd ~ ~, hh*4")
  .gain(0.5)
  .room(0.3)

title: Generative ambient
summary: Perlin noise and probability create an ever-changing ambient texture that never quite repeats.
code:
setcpm(60/4)

$: note("c4 e4 g4 b4 d5 b4 g4 e4")
  .s("gm_vibraphone")
  .gain(perlin.range(0, 0.6))
  .pan(perlin.range(0.2, 0.8).slow(3))
  .room(0.8).delay(0.6).delayfeedback(0.6)
  .slow(2)

$: note("<c3 g2 a2 f2>").s("gm_pad_warm")
  .room(0.9).gain(0.25)

$: s("hh?").gain(0.15).room(0.8)
  .pan(rand)

title: Folk strum pattern
summary: Acoustic guitar strum using the folk-strum progression style with a simple arrangement.
code:
setcpm(100/4)

$: progression('G D Em C', { style: 'folk-strum' })
  .room(0.3)
  .gain(0.5)

$: note("<g2 d2 e2 c2>").s("gm_acoustic_bass")
  .gain(0.5)

$: s("~ ~ ~ hh").gain(0.2)

title: Synthwave arpeggios
summary: 80s-style arpeggiated synths with gated reverb drums and pulsing bass.
code:
setcpm(118/4)

$: s("bd*4").gain(0.9)
$: s("~ sd ~ sd").room(0.4).gain(0.7)
$: s("hh*8").gain(0.3)

$: progression('Am Fmaj7 C G', { rhythm: 'arp-up' })
  .delay(0.3).delaytime(0.25).delayfeedback(0.3)
  .gain(0.4)

$: note("a1*4 f1*4 c2*4 g1*4").s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(400)
  .decay(0.1).sustain(0)
  .gain(0.6)
